message:
test(bench): Add criterion benchmarks for critical paths

Add comprehensive benchmarks using criterion with async_tokio support
for performance profiling of critical code paths.

pattern_detection.rs benchmarks:
- pattern_engine_creation: Measure engine initialization cost
- detect_no_match: Quick-reject path for non-matching content
- detect_single_match: Single pattern match detection
- detect_claude_code_compaction: Claude Code specific pattern
- detect_large_content: 10KB content processing performance

delta_extraction.rs benchmarks:
- extract_delta_small: Small diff (100 bytes, 10% change)
- extract_delta_medium: Medium diff (1KB, 20% change)
- extract_delta_large: Large diff (10KB, 5% change)
- extract_delta_no_overlap: Worst case - no overlap found (gap)
- extract_delta_sequential_capture: Multi-capture simulation

fts_query.rs benchmarks:
- fts_search_cold: Initial query (no cache benefit)
- fts_search_warm: Repeated query (measure cache effect)
- fts_search_large_db: 1000 segments, phrase search
- fts_insert_and_search: Combined write + read workload
- search_with_options: Filtered search (pane_id scope)

All benchmarks use deterministic setup with temp databases and
controlled data generation for reproducible results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
